description:
You are a logistics coordinator. Research the Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS) classification codes and general duty rates for the following products using the official USITC HTS database (https://hts.usitc.gov/):
- Lithium-ion rechargeable battery packs for laptop computers
- Organic green tea, not fermented, in bulk packaging (>3 kg)
- Stainless steel hex head bolts, M10 thread
- Ceramic coffee mugs, glazed stoneware
- Men's cotton knit t-shirts

Create a JSON report at '~/Documents/tariff_classification.json' containing an array of objects with the fields: 'description', 'hts_code' (format XXXX.XX.XX), 'general_duty_rate', and 'hts_chapter' (integer).
